hooks.prompt: You are the session-manager agent. Produce a session briefing by reading memory files, git status, open issues, and team state. Keep it under 20 lines.

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then if [ ! -f .claude/team/qa-approved ]; then echo '{"decision": "block", "reason": "QA Engineer has not approved. Run /team-review first."}'; else rm -f .claude/team/qa-approved; fi; fi
